title: Orbán concedes
subtitle: And that is in Hungary, which does not have much of a democratic tradition. People who suggest that democracy seriously is in danger in the United States need to rethink their world views (this claim however is slightly exaggerated). The problem instead is that democracy does not always bring you desired results… The post Orbán concedes appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
And that is in Hungary, which does not have much of a democratic tradition.  People who suggest that democracy seriously is in danger in the United States need to rethink their world views (this claim however is slightly exaggerated).  The problem instead is that democracy does not always bring you desired results…

The post Orbán concedes appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
